history.en: Ancient breed with roots in Dalmatia, Croatia, originally bred as carriage dogs to run for miles alongside horse-drawn coaches, guarding horses and coaches. Also served as circus performers and iconic firehouse mascots, particularly associated with American fire departments. Recognized by AKC in 1888.
history.zh: 古老犬种，原产于克罗地亚达尔马提亚，最初作为马车犬培育，可随马车奔跑数英里，护卫马匹和车辆。也曾作为马戏团表演犬和标志性消防站吉祥物，尤其与美国消防部门相关。1888年获AKC认可。

overview.en: The Dalmatian is a unique and striking breed known for its distinctive black or liver spotted coat. Energetic, outgoing, and intelligent, they are athletic dogs that thrive on activity and companionship. Originally bred as carriage dogs, they have a strong endurance and love to run. They are alert and make excellent watchdogs, but can be reserved with strangers. Dalmatians are generally good with children and other dogs when properly socialized. Their high energy levels require an active owner who can provide plenty of exercise and mental stimulation. Without sufficient activity, they may become destructive or develop behavioral issues. Overall, they are loyal, playful, and make wonderful family pets for the right household.
overview.zh: 大麦町犬以其独特的黑色或肝色斑点被毛而闻名，是一种独特且引人注目的犬种。它们精力充沛、外向、聪明，是运动型犬，喜欢活动和陪伴。最初被培育为马车犬，它们有很强的耐力，喜欢奔跑。它们警觉，是优秀的看门犬，但对陌生人可能有所保留。经过适当的社会化训练，大麦町犬通常对儿童和其他狗友好。它们的高能量水平需要活跃的主人，能够提供大量的运动和智力刺激。如果没有足够的活动，它们可能会变得具有破坏性或出现行为问题。总的来说，它们忠诚、爱玩，是适合合适家庭的绝佳家庭宠物。

care.en: Dalmatians require moderate grooming due to their short, dense coat that sheds year-round. Weekly brushing with a rubber curry brush or hound glove helps remove loose hair and keep the coat healthy. They are clean dogs with minimal odor, so baths are only needed occasionally. Nail trimming, ear cleaning, and dental care should be part of the routine. Exercise is crucial: they need at least 60-90 minutes of vigorous activity daily, including running, hiking, or play sessions. Without enough exercise, they can become hyperactive or destructive. Regular veterinary check-ups are important, especially for hearing and urinary health, as Dalmatians are prone to deafness and urinary stones. Spaying/neutering and vaccinations should follow vet recommendations.
care.zh: 大麦町犬的毛发短而密，全年都会掉毛，因此需要适度的梳理。每周用橡胶刷或猎犬手套梳理一次，有助于去除死毛并保持毛发健康。它们很干净，体味小，因此只需偶尔洗澡。定期修剪指甲、清洁耳朵和牙齿护理也应成为日常习惯。运动至关重要：每天需要至少60-90分钟的剧烈活动，包括跑步、远足或玩耍。如果运动不足，它们可能会变得过度活跃或具有破坏性。定期兽医检查很重要，特别是听力和泌尿系统健康，因为大麦町犬易患耳聋和尿结石。绝育和疫苗接种应遵循兽医建议。

training.en: Dalmatians are intelligent but can be stubborn, so training requires patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement methods. Start socialization and basic obedience early, ideally from puppyhood. Use treats, praise, and play as rewards; harsh corrections can cause them to shut down or become defiant. They respond well to clicker training and enjoy learning tricks. Because they were bred to work closely with humans, they thrive on tasks and activities that engage their mind. Keep training sessions short and varied to hold their attention. Crate training is recommended for housebreaking and providing a safe space. Address any signs of separation anxiety early, as they are prone to it. Enrolling in puppy classes or working with a professional trainer can be beneficial.
training.zh: 大麦町犬聪明但可能固执，因此训练需要耐心、一致性和积极的强化方法。尽早开始社会化训练和基本服从训练，最好从幼犬时期开始。使用零食、表扬和玩耍作为奖励；严厉的纠正可能导致它们退缩或变得叛逆。它们对响片训练反应良好，并喜欢学习技巧。由于它们被培育为与人类密切合作，它们喜欢那些能激发思维的任务和活动。保持训练课程简短且多样化，以吸引它们的注意力。建议使用笼子训练来进行家庭训练并提供安全空间。早期处理任何分离焦虑的迹象，因为它们容易患上分离焦虑。参加幼犬课程或与专业训练师合作可能有益。

diet.en: Dalmatians have unique dietary needs due to their predisposition to urinary stones (urate stones). They require a low-purine diet to minimize uric acid production. Avoid foods high in purines such as organ meats (liver, kidney), game meats, and certain fish like sardines. High-quality commercial dog foods formulated for urinary health or low-purine diets are recommended. Some owners choose a carefully balanced homemade diet under veterinary guidance. Ensure constant access to fresh water to promote urination and dilute urine. Feeding two or three smaller meals per day rather than one large meal can help regulate metabolism. Monitor weight closely, as Dalmatians can become overweight if overfed or under-exercised. Consult your vet for specific dietary recommendations.
diet.zh: 大麦町犬由于易患尿结石（尿酸盐结石），有独特的饮食需求。它们需要低嘌呤饮食以尽量减少尿酸的产生。避免高嘌呤食物，如内脏（肝脏、肾脏）、野味和某些鱼类（如沙丁鱼）。推荐使用为泌尿健康或低嘌呤饮食配制的优质商业狗粮。一些主人选择在兽医指导下精心平衡的自制饮食。确保持续提供新鲜水，以促进排尿并稀释尿液。每天喂食两到三顿小餐，而不是一大餐，有助于调节新陈代谢。密切监测体重，因为如果喂食过多或运动不足，大麦町犬可能会超重。请咨询兽医获取具体的饮食建议。

livingTips.en: Dalmatians are best suited for homes with a securely fenced yard where they can run and play. They can adapt to apartment living if given sufficient daily exercise, but a house with a yard is ideal. They are not recommended for sedentary households. Dalmatians generally get along well with children, especially when raised with them, but their high energy may accidentally knock over small toddlers. Supervision is advised. They can coexist with other dogs and pets if properly socialized, but they may have a high prey drive towards small animals like cats or rodents. Early socialization is key. Dalmatians are sensitive to extreme temperatures, so provide shade and water in hot weather and a warm shelter in cold. They are known to be escape artists, so ensure fencing is secure.
livingTips.zh: 大麦町犬最适合有安全围栏院子的家庭，这样它们可以奔跑和玩耍。如果每天能获得足够的运动，它们也能适应公寓生活，但有院子的房子是理想选择。不建议久坐不动的家庭饲养。大麦町犬通常与儿童相处融洽，尤其是与它们一起长大的孩子，但它们的高能量可能会意外撞倒幼童，因此建议监督。如果经过适当的社会化训练，它们可以与其他狗和宠物共存，但可能对猫或啮齿动物等小动物有较高的捕猎本能。早期社会化是关键。大麦町犬对极端温度敏感，因此在炎热天气提供阴凉和水，在寒冷天气提供温暖的庇护所。它们以善于逃跑而闻名，因此确保围栏安全。
